response: maria needs to buy a set of brushes for 20 dollars and some canvas for three times more than the brushes. the paint costs 8 dollars per liter and she needs at least 5 liters. she will be able to sell it for 200 dollars. the total cost of the brushes is 20 dollars. the total cost of the canvas is 20 dollars * 3 = 60 dollars. the total cost of the paint is 8 dollars * 5 liters = 40 dollars. the total cost of all items is 20 + 60 + 40 = 120 dollars. she will earn 200 - 120 = 80 dollars. the answer is 80.
